nonBlockingIssues.description: The '...' placeholder in l2-s4 (Data Transfer Examples) is within a code comment ('; ... function body ...') showing an assembly pattern. This is acceptable documentation style, not stub content.

VAL-LECTURE-002.notes: Required metadata fields (id, title, sourceFile, pageCount, concepts, instructions, difficulty, examRelevance, provenance) present

VAL-SECTION-002.notes: No stub content detected. The '...' in l2-s4 is within a code comment as documentation pattern.

VAL-SECTION-003.notes: All required section fields present: id, lectureId, title, content, concepts, instructions, examples, assessmentItems

VAL-CONTENT-001.notes: Markdown formatting present: headers (##, ###), code blocks (```asm), lists (-, *), tables (|) found in all sections

VAL-CONTENT-002.notes: Assembly syntax present: MOV instruction found in L1-s4, L1-s5, and all L2 sections. Register names (AX, BX, CX, DX, SI, DI, SP, BP) present throughout.

VAL-CONTENT-003.notes: No placeholder markers (TODO, FIXME, XXX, PLACEHOLDER) found. Only '...' appears, but in code comment context ('; ... function body ...') which is valid documentation.

VAL-COVERAGE-001.notes: L1 has 5 sections (>= 4 minimum), L2 has 4 sections (>= 4 minimum)

VAL-COVERAGE-002.notes: L1 total: 14185 chars, L2 total: 13659 chars. Both exceed thresholds.

summary: Feature extract-l1-l2-full passes review. All L1 sections meet 1500+ char requirement and all L2 sections meet 2000+ char requirement. Markdown formatting (headers, code blocks, lists, tables) is present throughout. Assembly syntax (MOV instruction, register names) is properly included. All metadata preserved. No blocking issues found. The single '...' occurrence in l2-s4 is within a code comment as documentation pattern, not stub content.
